title: Timmy the Whale Got Stranded Off the German Coast. Then Things Got Weird.
summary_full: A humpback that became stuck in the Baltic seemed to unite a nation in hope. Rescue efforts followed, and then finger-pointing.
summary_public: A humpback that became stuck in the Baltic seemed to unite a nation in hope. Rescue efforts followed, and then finger-pointing.
